---
title: "Eliza Yard"
---

## Eliza Yard

**Dates:** (b. London 1804/5)

### Description

sister of Adelaide Yard

### Biography

The Miss Yards were residents of Otterbourne 1848, 1859, 1861, living in Winchester Kingsgate St 1864 and 1871, and in 1881 with brother Frederick Yard 58, major in army;  they were friends of Elizabeth Sewell.

### Letters

- Letter from April 4th [1866]
- Letter from Febry 18th 1861
- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from February 23, 1853
- Letter from Easter Eve [<i>c</i>. 1853-1862]
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
